non_blocking_observations: The cockpit JSON files are suitable for a future UI prototype but should first be normalized into a stricter view-model contract.
Generated reports are useful for human review but are not a stable UI API.
Quote Type Tagging is represented, but executable quote validation is not automated.
The current cockpit layer depends on local regeneration after new runtime records are added.
consistency_findings: latest_state.json exposes the latest active checkpoint, core_position_defense_mode, account posture, closed cleanup positions, and Binance USDT defense ratio.
manifest.json points to all current cockpit summary files and includes runtime_timeline.json in the recommended read order.

account_structure.json separates U.S. equities, crypto spot, cash and stablecoin posture, leveraged exposure, closed cleanup positions, historical cleanup, quote quality, and execution reconciliation.

active_rules.json distinguishes main_core_risk_watch, main_remaining_leveraged_etf_risk_valve, ordinary_gld_concentration_risk_line_protection, closed_position_guardrail, staged_buyback_watch, and usdt_dominant_defense rule types.
strategy_states.json keeps 16 states and consistently marks SOXL, UGL, INTC, ZEC grid, SOXS, TSLQ, and GDXU as closed or historical where appropriate.
runtime_timeline.json has zero warnings and includes chronological source files, event types, summaries, priorities, and tags.
SOXL, UGL, and INTC remain closed_position and are not treated as active positions.
GGLL remains the main remaining leveraged ETF risk valve.
NVDA remains the main core-risk watch.
GLD is represented as ordinary GLD concentration and risk-line protection rather than only UGL-linked protection.
ZEC grid remains closed / no reopen.
Binance remains USDT-dominant with approximately 71.7% USDT defense ratio in the latest checkpoint.
recommended_next_phase: Vol.5 Phase 5.2 - Cockpit View Model Contract
explicit_confirmations: No GitHub Projects board was created.
No new GitHub Issues were created.
